message:
test(wi80): add inference safety integration tests

Add 5 new tests to e2e_plan.rs verifying critical safety properties:
- kernel_threads_never_in_candidates: PPID 0/2 never in candidates
- zombie_processes_classified_correctly: state=Z → classification=zombie
- candidates_sorted_by_posterior_descending: proper TOP-N ranking
- protected_filter_stats_in_summary: filter stats in JSON output
- candidate_json_has_required_fields: ppid, state, user fields present

Also fix duplicate ProtectedFilter import in main.rs.

All 32 e2e_plan tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
